basic_details.job_title: THSTI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist, Project Associate and Project Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI)
basic_details.post_name: Project Research Scientist -I (Assistant Data Manager), Project Manager (Regulatory Science Program), Project Associate

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 Years for Project Research Scientist -I, Max: 45 years for Project Manager, Max: 30 years for Project Associate
age_limit.details: Project Research Scientist -I (Assistant Data Manager): Maximum Age: 35 Years (Age relaxation applicable for SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: UR-10 years, OBC-13 years, SC/ST-15 years) Project Manager (Regulatory Science Program): Maximum Age: 45 Years (Age relaxation applicable for SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: UR-10 years, OBC-13 years, SC/ST-15 years) Project Associate: Maximum Age: 30 Years (Age relaxation applicable for SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: UR-10 years, OBC-13 years, SC/ST-15 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree, BE/BTECH, Postgraduate degree, Bachelor's degree
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist -I (Assistant Data Manager): Master's degree in any field preferably in science with experience in clinical data management/ clinical research/ MIS/ data analysis/ IT/ computer science/ healthcare field OR BE/BTECH degree in computer science or related field preferably in science with experience in clinical data management/ clinical research/ MIS/ data analysis/ IT/ computer science/ healthcare field. Project Manager (Regulatory Science Program): Postgraduate degree in life sciences, pharmacy, biotechnology, clinical research, regulatory affairs or other relevant discipline from a recognized university. At least 5 years of relevant experience in project or program management. Project Associate: Bachelor's degree in Life Sciences, Pharmacy, Biotechnology, Biomedical Sciences, Health Sciences, Allied Health Sciences from a recognized university OR Master's degree in Clinical Research, Public Health, Regulatory Affairs, Pharmacy, Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Biomedical Sciences, from a recognized university. At least 2 years of relevant experience.

salary_details.details: Project Research Scientist -I (Assistant Data Manager): Rs. 56,000/- +HRA Project Manager (Regulatory Science Program): Rs. 1,25,000/- Project Associate: Upto Rs. 50,000

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the THSTI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of THSTI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for THSTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the THSTI Recruitment 2026 is 30th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in THSTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: THSTI has announced a total of 3 vacancies for various posts, including Project Research Scientist -I (Assistant Data Manager), Project Manager, and Project Associate.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Research Scientist -I (Assistant Data Manager)?
faq.answer: For the Project Research Scientist -I (Assistant Data Manager) position, candidates need a Master's degree in science or a BE/BTECH degree in computer science or a related field, with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for Project Manager post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Manager (Regulatory Science Program) post is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Associate position is up to Rs. 50,000 per month. Specific details regarding allowances may be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for Unreserved category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for Unreserved, OBC, and EWS candidates is Rs. 590/-. For SC/ST/Women/PwBD candidates, the fee is Rs. 118/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for THSTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for THSTI Recruitment 2026 typically involves a written test, skill test, and/or an interview. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific details.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply through offline mode?
faq.answer: No, applications for THSTI Recruitment 2026 must be submitted strictly through the online mode. Applications submitted through any other mode will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for THSTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for THSTI Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST candidates. They are eligible for a 5-year age relaxation over and above the maximum age limit specified for the respective posts.
